prompt: I added 200 new fundus images to the catalog yesterday and also fixed labels on about 30 images that were mislabeled. My training config still references dataset 28EA version 0.3.0. What do I need to do before running my next experiment?

assertions.name: explains_snapshot_semantics
assertions.description: Should explain that existing versions are frozen snapshots and changes aren't visible in v0.3.0
assertions.check: mentions that versions are snapshots or that changes are not included in existing versions

assertions.name: provides_version_description
assertions.description: Should provide a meaningful description covering both changes (new images + label fixes)
assertions.check: description mentions both the 200 new images and the 30 label corrections

assertions.name: updates_config
assertions.description: Should instruct to update DatasetSpecConfig to the new version number
assertions.check: mentions updating DatasetSpecConfig or config file with the new version

assertions.name: commits_before_running
assertions.description: Should instruct to commit config changes before running the experiment
assertions.check: mentions committing or git commit before running

assertions.name: never_suggests_current
assertions.check: does not suggest version='current' or omitting the version

assertions.name: considers_semver_component
assertions.description: Should consider whether this is a minor or patch increment (new data = minor, label fixes = patch — combined is minor)
assertions.check: mentions or considers the semantic versioning component (major/minor/patch)
